---
name: Content error
about: Report an inaccuracy or mistake in the website's documentation or text
title: ''
labels: content
assignees: ''
---

**Which page?**
Include the URL or path of the page with the error.

**What's wrong?**
Describe the inaccuracy or mistake in the content.
Include the exact text currently shown and why you believe it's incorrect.

**What should it say? (optional)**
Provide the corrected text.

**Source / reference (optional)**
If you have an authoritative source (e.g. official WPILib docs, FIRST rules, SDK source), link or quote it here.

**Screenshots**
If helpful, add a screenshot of the page showing the error.

**Additional context**
Anything else that may help us fix it quickly.
